title: Indian Films at the Oscars — Every Entry Ever
description: India's complete Oscar history — which films were submitted, which were nominated, and which won.
intro: India has been submitting films to the Academy Awards since 1957. Only three have received nominations. Here's the complete, honest story of Indian cinema at the Oscars.

entries.blurb: Nominated for Best Foreign Film, Oscars 2002. India's greatest Oscar moment.

film.title: Lagaan
film.verdict: Nominated for Best Foreign Film, Oscars 2002. India's greatest Oscar moment.

entries.blurb: Nominated for Best Foreign Film, Oscars 1958. Lost by one vote.

film.title: Mother India
film.verdict: Nominated for Best Foreign Film, Oscars 1958. Lost by one vote.

entries.blurb: Nominated for Best Foreign Film, Oscars 1989. A landmark in Indian cinema.

film.title: Salaam Bombay!
film.verdict: Nominated for Best Foreign Film, Oscars 1989. A landmark in Indian cinema.

entries.blurb: India's official Oscar entry 2025. Aamir Khan produced. Kiran Rao directs.

film.title: Laapataa Ladies
film.verdict: India's official Oscar entry 2025. Aamir Khan produced. Kiran Rao directs.

entries.blurb: Won Best Original Song at Oscars 2023. India's first competitive Oscar win.

film.title: RRR — Naatu Naatu
film.verdict: Won Best Original Song at Oscars 2023. India's first competitive Oscar win.
